message:
feat: drop-in replacement CLI for python3 and pip3

- Add python3-compatible flags: -c, -m, -, -u, -O
- Add pip-compatible commands: install, show, list, freeze, cache
- Nice UX with colors like uv
- Fix json_simd module import (use @import instead of path)

Now users can:
  metal0 app.py              # 30x faster than python3 app.py
  metal0 -c "print('hi')"    # execute code string
  metal0 -m pip install X    # use pip through metal0
  metal0 install requests    # direct pip-style install
